message:
test(auth): expand detection and orchestrator coverage

Comprehensive table-driven tests for all pure auth functions:
- DetectBrowserURL: 9 cases (URL variants, negatives, edge cases)
- DetectAuthSuccess/Failure: 8 cases each (embedded, partials, negatives)
- DetectChallengeCode: 8 cases
- NewClaudeAuthFlow: local and remote modes
- NewOrchestrator: constructor verification
- RegisterAuthFlow: single, multiple, overwrite
- ShellPromptRegexps: 15 cases (bash/zsh/generic, mid-text negatives)
All pure functions now at 100% coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
